nodes.label: Home Screen — Inactive State (Focus Session Setup)
nodes.description: Home screen in inactive/pre-session state. Personalized greeting 'Buenas tardes, Juan, ¿Listo para hoy?'. Duration pill selector (1h, 2h, 3h, 4h, 6h) with pencil/edit icon. Section 'Mejora tu concentración' lists apps to block during focus: Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, X, Facebook — each with a toggle switch. 'Agregar apps' CTA. Section 'Complementos del ritual' with editable ritual items: Meditar (10 min), Leer (20 pp), Estudiar (45 min), Respirar (5 min), Gratitud (3 min), Entrenar (30 min), Journaling, Visualizar. Bottom tab bar: Home, Explorar, IA, Comunidad, Perfil.

properties.dev_panel: Mentex Tweaks visible (Glass card style, Geist/Inter/Manrope typography toggle, accent color, Inactivo/Activo state toggle)

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks — Dev Panel (Design System Controls)
nodes.description: Developer overlay panel 'Mentex Tweaks' visible in the right portion of the screen. AUTH (DEV) section with auth reset/navigation links. ESTADO toggle (Inactivo/Activo). ACENTO color picker (principal teal/cyan). ESTILO DE CARDS: Glass, Líneas, Plano. TIPOGRAFÍA Familia: Geist, Inter, Manrope.

nodes.label: Duration Pill Selector — Focus Session Duration Chooser
nodes.description: Horizontal row of pill-shaped buttons for selecting focus session duration: 1h, 2h, 3h, 4h, 6h. Pencil/edit icon to the left for custom duration. Design pattern: compact horizontal pill strip in dark theme.

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks — Shared Dev Overlay Panel (Design System Switcher)
nodes.description: The 'Mentex Tweaks' developer panel appears across multiple screens (pills-smaller, active-whisper-v2, split-sections-v1-scroll, home-state). It is a floating overlay with sections: AUTH (DEV) for auth state navigation, ESTADO (Inactivo/Activo toggle), ACENTO (accent color), ESTILO DE CARDS (Glass/Líneas/Plano), TIPOGRAFÍA (Geist/Inter/Manrope). This is a design system live-switcher for development/QA use.

properties.purpose: design system live switching during development

nodes.label: Home Tab Bar — Bottom Navigation (5 Tabs)
nodes.description: Bottom tab bar present on Home screen: Home (active), Explorar, IA, Comunidad, Perfil. Consistent across active and inactive states.
